scripts.directus:start: env $(grep -v '^#' .env-pro | xargs) docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.directus.yml up -d
scripts.stop: pm2 stop luykin-chaineye-api luykin-chaineye-crawler luykin-chaineye-bot luykin-chaineye-jobs
scripts.restart: pm2 restart luykin-chaineye-api luykin-chaineye-crawler luykin-chaineye-bot luykin-chaineye-jobs
scripts.delete: pm2 delete luykin-chaineye-api luykin-chaineye-crawler luykin-chaineye-bot luykin-chaineye-jobs
scripts.logs: pm2 logs luykin-chaineye-api luykin-chaineye-crawler luykin-chaineye-bot luykin-chaineye-jobs
scripts.db:migrate:pg: NODE_ENV=production npx sequelize-cli db:migrate --config config/config-pg.json --migrations-path migrations-pg
scripts.db:migrate:pg:undo: NODE_ENV=production npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo --config config/config-pg.json --migrations-path migrations-pg
scripts.db:migrate:pg:status: NODE_ENV=production npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:status --config config/config-pg.json --migrations-path migrations-pg
scripts.db:migrate:rootdatapro: NODE_ENV=production npx sequelize-cli db:migrate --config config/config-rootdatapro.json --migrations-path migrations-rootdatapro
scripts.db:migrate:rootdatapro:undo: NODE_ENV=production npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo --config config/config-rootdatapro.json --migrations-path migrations-rootdatapro
scripts.db:migrate:rootdatapro:status: NODE_ENV=production npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:status --config config/config-rootdatapro.json --migrations-path migrations-rootdatapro
scripts.emergency:recover: echo '🚀 [1/3] 正在获取远程最新代码...' && git fetch origin && echo '🚀 [2/3] 正在恢复今日代码...' && git reset --hard origin/main && echo '🚀 [3/3] 正在重启所有服务...' && pm2 restart all && echo '' && echo '✅ 恢复完成！当前版本:' && git log --oneline -1
